meaning: adj.未生效的,未实现的,未实施的,未执行的
examples: Analysis and inquiry of all implemented and unimplemented budget line and details.
The remaining methods - which vary between concrete implementations - are left unimplemented.
Even the 1974 disengagement agreement remains unimplemented in such significant aspects as repopulation and troop levels.
Yet the law remained unimplemented both on account of relatively weak organisational capacities on the part of the journalists and the under-developed character of the media industry.
